name: Smoker Stuffed Salmon
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 4
Prepare salmon and brush with oil. Combine remaining ingredients and stuff salmon with this mixture. Place salmon on a sheet of heavy duty foil that has been doubled and greased. Place on water smoker grid and smoke. Yield: 4 servings. Charcoal: Use 7 lbs. charcoal, 4 quarts hot water, 2 wood chunks and smoke for 3-1/2 to 4-1/2 hours. Electric: Use 4 quarts hot water, 2 wood chunks and smoke for 3 to 4 hours.
